reviews.comment:
Bien, baños limpios amplio estacionamiento, hermoso parque con mesas y bancas para pasar el rato, también tienen parque de juego para los más peques.

(Translated by Google)
Good, clean bathrooms, ample parking, beautiful park with tables and benches to relax in, they also have a playground for the little ones.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURWOTczX2R3EAE

reviews.comment:
Hermoso lugar.excelente atención.siempre voy a parar allí camino a Mar del Plata.muy limpio.amplia arboleda para descansar después de repostar combustible.agua caliente gratis.

(Translated by Google)
Beautiful place. Excellent service. I always stop there on my way to Mar del Plata. Very clean. Large grove of trees to relax in after refueling. Free hot water.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURWNC0zMldBEAE
